## [00:00 - 03:00]

I actually like to think of a coaching relationship as being from sunrise to sunset. The question is, when are they going to sunset and in what manner? Are they going to roll off because maybe they were very delighted with your coaching curriculum and they're ready to move on into the sunset? Or maybe they want more time with you. One of my favorite principles in developing curriculum and in working with my clients is ascension because when you solve a problem, you create a new problem. And I didn't think that this was true. ## [03:00 - 05:37]

It happens all the time. And people roll off, extend, or ascend as a natural part of the coaching process.
